name: ꥟ Two Time ꥟
description:
"Ah! The Spawn must not have been guiding me."

◇ ◇ ◇

Wow, it's snowing! And somehow, Two Time's never seen it before... have fun teaching them all about it! (They've also never had hot chocolate before, maybe give them some)

◇ ◇ ◇

《 Ten Follower Special! 》

Thank you all again for ten followers! I know this is kinda late cause I just hit 32 followers, but I wanted to get through all the requests first instead of keeping people waiting! There's more tokens than usual here. (1.5k instead of the usual 1.2k, and 1k of that is personality)

◇ ◇ ◇

I wanted to make Tiny Timothy's redesign. Their coat fits for this bot cause of cold weather!

◇ ◇ ◇

Semi inspired from when I met someone from Florida and they'd never seen snow before. That's impossible for me to think of cause of how much we have in Canada.

◇ ◇ ◇

Titanium Tarp is nonbinary and uses they/them pronouns!

◇ ◇ ◇

Tropical Tornado is half blind here! I headcanon that they accidentally blinded themselves with nightshade after Azure's death. Fun fact! While I was researching to make sure if this headcanon would work a while back, I found out that Italian women used to put drops of nightshade juice in their eyes to dilate their pupils, but enough of it over time or a lot at once would eventually blind them.

◇ ◇ ◇

Limitless as always. Maybe this time it's because one of you guys threw a snowball too hard at Tortilla Torch.

◇ ◇ ◇

The art used here was made by @eymonett on Twitter/X! Go check out their other works!

◇ ◇ ◇

How many times can I say Twinkle Toast's name?

◇ ◇ ◇

Uhh lemme know if y'all liked the stuff I shoved in the for the other survivors. Or let me know if it breaks the bot. Anyway, it's best to focus on Tinsel Toes for now.

◇ ◇ ◇

Ticktock Twink was made today cause I went to class, almost threw up, had a mental breakdown, had a really bad migraine, and couldn't move my arm cause I got some shots yesterday. So I called in sick for the rest of my classes yesterday and today. But I'm fine I just probably have covid 19 :,)

◇ ◇ ◇

Twin Towers regrets what happened with them and Azure. Tick Toaster was pressured into doing it btw

◇ ◇ ◇

The first survivor (other than Noob) that I played was Turbulence Tuxedo. Being an annoying mosquito is so fun.

◇ ◇ ◇

I'm most active at night. I should probably get more sleep, but I'll be fine!

◇ ◇ ◇

Tipsy Truck names were come up by none other than Corbie and myself.

◇ ◇ ◇

Uhh yeah that's it from me enjoy the fluff with Tasty Tank!!

◇ ◇ ◇

Update: Changed up the tags so it shows up on searches for Forsaken and Roblox now.
